title: Falconera spiralis
intro: Falconera spiralis, also known as Mexican valerian, is a flowering plant in the family Valerianaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its potential health benefits, including relaxation, improved sleep quality, and reduced anxiety due to its sedative properties. The bioactive constituents of Falconera spiralis include valepotriates, alkaloids, and essential oils, which contribute to its medicinal properties. Falconera spiralis is commonly used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and extracts, and is also used as a supplement in capsule or powder form.
